topics.title: Studio Logistics and Show Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal production issues, listener feedback regarding Bob Levy's performance, and various segments from their Sirius satellite radio programming.

topics.title: Satellite Radio and Show Segments
topics.summary: The studio discusses the transition to satellite radio, upcoming segments featuring various guests, and a series of comedic musical clips.

topics.title: Spelling Bee Competition and Comedy Bits
topics.summary: The studio features a spelling bee between Bob Leavy and a ten-year-old boy, followed by the airing of various comedy sketches and roast segments.

topics.title: Touchstone Terrorists and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a series of pre-recorded comedy sketches, listener interactions regarding personal conduct, and a news segment discussing celebrity events including a protest against Rachel Hunter and Bubba the Love Sponge's weight loss.

topics.title: Casey's Rehab and Business Struggles
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Casey's time in rehab, his claims of not wanting to quit drinking despite being in treatment, and the logistical hurdles he faces in releasing a DVD.

topics.title: Casey's Recovery and Satellite Radio Regulation
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Casey's personal struggles and recovery, followed by a discussion on the political efforts to regulate satellite radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Expansion and Industry Regulation
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of satellite radio, potential government regulation by Senator Ted Stevens, and the impact of Howard Stern's move to the platform.

topics.title: Sports Predictions and Staff Conflict
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on upcoming football games, the performance of Jerry Rice on Dancing with the Stars, and an internal dispute regarding personal remarks made toward a staff member's wife.

topics.title: Hostility Over On-Air Comments
topics.summary: The studio records a heated exchange between participants regarding a woman's reaction to previous broadcast remarks and the authenticity of various personal claims.

topics.title: Celebrity Relationships and Television Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including personal anecdotes involving pets, observations of public behavior at hotels, and the professional implications of appearing on reality television shows like Celebrity Fit Club.

topics.title: Comedy Routine and Celebrity Rumors
topics.summary: The studio features a comedy act involving a woman and a discussion regarding the identities of engaged celebrities.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Political Rumors
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on celebrity secrets, including rumors regarding Star Jones and Ted Kennedy's personal life, followed by an interview with Mike Walker from the National Enquirer.

topics.title: Gossip Game and Radio Industry Dynamics
topics.summary: The show features a segment where listeners guess which of four celebrity stories is fake, followed by a discussion on the impact of prenuptial agreements and the competitive landscape of satellite radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Transition and National Security
topics.summary: The studio discusses the transition from terrestrial to satellite radio, the perceived lack of originality in rival programming, and recent news regarding Osama bin Laden's videos and government surveillance programs.

topics.title: Stalker Harassment and Music Industry Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses a stalker targeting an American Idol contestant, legal issues surrounding satellite radio equipment, and a dispute between Kelly Clarkson and American Idol over music licensing.
